patch.value: CONTEXT: manifests declare sandbox_profile none|restricted|strict, but extensions run in-process with full Node access. DECISION: in v0.x, profiles are a policy/attestation surface only (no vm/Worker/seccomp) because ESM+native-addon vm isolation is incomplete and the primary consumers are trusted; coarse protection comes from trust_mode=enforce + require_provenance. CONSEQUENCES: zero activation overhead, full API for extensions; an untrusted malicious extension is not contained by profile alone; should surface an advisory warning (proposed) clarifying the guarantee. EVIDENCE: src/core/extensions/extension-policy.ts, loader.ts import(); item pm-7sd.
ADR: Extension sandbox profiles are advisory governance attestations, not enforced isolation
Extension sandbox profiles are advisory governance attestations, not enforced isolation
ADR recorded and accepted; architectural decision documented as durable context on 2026-05-31.
